indicators.impact: Cross-border household and investor inflows continue to support demand in gateway submarkets.
indicators.explanation: Migration pressure acts as a leading signal for rental absorption, owner-occupier demand, and school-led family moves.

indicators.name: Supply pressure
indicators.impact: Tighter supply keeps pricing firmer and reduces downside from inventory overhang.
indicators.explanation: Permit activity, active listings, and absorption velocity are fused into the local supply-demand score.

indicators.name: Investor liquidity
indicators.impact: Capital availability remains selective but supportive for high-conviction assets.
indicators.explanation: Liquidity gauges how quickly investors can transact or exit without excessive price concessions.

forecasts.explanation: Short-range signal blends rate-path stabilization, migration-led demand, and current absorption into a tactical market posture.
Base forecast captures easing affordability constraints, inbound migration, and slow supply replenishment across target markets.
Longer-range outlook is produced from retrained horizon models combining macro, migration, rate, and supply-demand features for portfolio planning.

alerts.title: Rate sensitivity compressing
alerts.signal: Financing spreads are improving faster than active inventory is rebuilding.
alerts.action: Promote financing-ready opportunities and surface affordability alerts in the frontend.

alerts.title: Migration-led demand cluster
alerts.signal: Athens is seeing sustained demand from cross border investor and worker inflows patterns.
alerts.action: Increase alerting for neighborhoods with school, transit, and visa-aligned demand concentration.

alerts.title: Supply imbalance watch
alerts.signal: Supply-demand imbalance favors owners and income strategies, but underwriting should stay disciplined.
alerts.action: Prioritize assets with resilient rent coverage and documented downside cases before broad market expansion.

pipeline_status.detail: Macro, local-market, migration, and supply-demand feeds are normalized into a governed feature store.
Interest-rate, inventory, migration, absorption, and affordability features are refreshed for daily inference.
Horizon-specific forecasting models retrain weekly with champion-challenger validation and drift checks.
Forward-looking alerts and forecast summaries are published to investor, broker, and analyst workspaces.

market_intelligence_decision.signal_summary: Macro intelligence for Mediterranean income markets is moderately bullish: migration flows and tight supply support demand, while the easing bias rate regime improves forward pricing and rent resilience.
market_intelligence_decision.recommendation: Use the market intelligence engine to surface 24-month signals, watch migration-led demand clusters in Athens, and alert users when rates or supply conditions materially change the underwriting case.
market_intelligence_decision.explanation: The predictive market intelligence engine fused global rate expectations, Southern Europe migration flows, Athens supply-demand conditions, and investor-liquidity signals to generate 3 horizon forecasts and 3 alerts. Backend workflows continuously ingest market data streams, retrain forecasting models, and publish explainable forward-looking signals for investors, brokers, and analysts.

tokenization_decision.eligibility_summary: Fractional investment is available only to investors who pass KYC, AML, beneficial-owner, and jurisdiction-specific securities checks.
tokenization_decision.distribution_policy: Quarterly net-rent distributions with reserve top-ups and annual tax-statement delivery.

compliance_checks.name: KYC / beneficial owner verification
compliance_checks.detail: Primary subscription is blocked until controller and beneficial-owner evidence remain current.

compliance_checks.name: AML / sanctions / source-of-funds
compliance_checks.detail: Cross-border flows require sanctions clearance, source-of-funds evidence, and ongoing transaction monitoring.

compliance_checks.name: Securities eligibility and transfer restrictions
compliance_checks.detail: Investor class, jurisdiction, and holding-period rules control whether subscription or transfer can be released.

compliance_checks.name: Cash settlement and cap-table reconciliation
compliance_checks.detail: Units are only allocated after escrow settlement, administrator reconciliation, and legal-ledger synchronization.

ledger_events.detail: Athens Urban Residential Block Token Offering is wrapped through Luxembourg feeder SPV with transfer-agent controls in Luxembourg with a governed unit supply.
Reserved units stay non-transferable until disclosures, investor classification, and payment evidence are complete.
Escrow, subscription funds, and administrator ledger references must reconcile before allocation finality.
Digital units are minted or allocated only after legal-ledger approval, not directly from frontend intent alone.
Secondary transfers require buyer KYC refresh, suitability review, whitelist approval, and settlement finality.

recommended_actions: Keep legal-ledger, cash-ledger, and token-ledger reconciliation in the same approval workflow.
Require jurisdiction-aware whitelist review before any secondary transfer.
Publish investor statements and audit evidence after each issuance, distribution, or redemption cycle.
tokenization_decision.explanation: EstateOS models tokenization for Athens Urban Residential Block Token Offering as a governed securities-style workflow. The frontend can market units, show distributions, and collect subscriptions, but the backend remains authoritative for investor eligibility, cap-table integrity, settlement reconciliation, and transfer restrictions under Luxembourg feeder SPV with transfer-agent controls.

reasoning_trace.detail: The copilot aligns the response to the investor journey, cross-border property investment with residency options objective, and consideration stage before choosing an answer style.
Property, investment, finance, and compliance summaries are pulled first so the response cites governed recommendations instead of free-form opinion.
The copilot reframes the same evidence differently for buyer, investor, visa, insurance, or compliance conversations without changing the underlying facts.
Before answering, the system checks privacy tier, consent scope, audit logging, and hold conditions so only policy-cleared details appear in the conversation.

guardrails.detail: Short-term memory stores only journey objectives, released decisions, and approved evidence references; raw PII stays outside the chat transcript.
Every answer is conditioned on the selected role so buyers, investors, insurance users, and compliance reviewers get the same facts with different framing.
Each answer points back to MoE packets, expert summaries, and policy-gate outcomes instead of opaque free generation.
Responses inherit policy-gate results and currently track 0 elevated gates before export or partner release.
